_comment: Known Snyk Code false positives — each already triaged, with an inline // deepcode ignore at the site. The snyk CLI does not honour those inline markers, so this fingerprint set keeps ci/snyk-code-scan.sh from re-flagging them. Per-rule rationale: CONTRIBUTING.md > Static analysis (Snyk Code). Regenerate after re-triage: ci/snyk-code-scan.sh --update.
